subcodes.first_line: The bounty of God hath descended from the heaven of the will of your Lord, the All-Merciful. Verily, thou beholdest it embodied in the temple of man. Thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نعمه الله قد نزلت من سماء مشیه ربکم الرحمن انک تراها علی هیکل الانسان کذلک
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
